description:
Model a monitor barn (raised center aisle) and design a multi-level rooftop solar array using the Skelion plugin.

Instructions:
1. Model the barn footprint: 12m wide × 15m long. Ensure units are in meters.
2. Create the monitor profile: The center aisle is 4m wide (middle third) and rises to 6m height with a gable roof. The two side aisles are each 4m wide, rising to 3m height with shed roofs sloping outwards.
3. Assume the 15m length runs East-West, so the broad roof slopes face North and South.
4. Using the Skelion plugin, place solar panels (flush mount, 0° tilt relative to roof, landscape orientation) on the South-facing roof of the UPPER monitor section.
5. Using the Skelion plugin, place solar panels (flush mount, 0° tilt, landscape orientation) on the South-facing roof of the LOWER southern side aisle.
6. Save the SketchUp model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\monitor_barn.skp'.
7. Export the 3D model to Collada format via File > Export > 3D Model. Save it as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\monitor_barn.dae'.
